mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM board WHERE id = #{id, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM board WHERE id = #{id, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} AND user_id = #{userId})
SELECT * FROM board WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1
